kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://rahulshettyacademy.com/Library/Addbook.php path_url=/Library/Addbook.php headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '108', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "Robotframeworkeeee", "isbn": "21093829dd830128", "aisle": "219333812398", "auth": "rahushdddetty"}'

POST Response : url=https://rahulshettyacademy.com/Library/Addbook.php status=200, reason=OK headers={'Date': 'Tue, 17 Feb 2026 17:45:43 GMT', 'Server': 'Apache/2.4.52 (Ubuntu)', 'Strict-Transport-Security': 'max-age=604800; includeSubDomains', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'POST', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '3600', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type, Access-Control-Allow-Headers, Authorization, X-Requested-With', 'Content-Length': '0', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5, max=100', 'Connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=UTF-8'} body=None

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

errors.msg: Error in file '/Users/sullivan/Desktop/Tuto-Youtube/formation-robot-framework/robot-framework-with-python-automation-testing/test/formation-end-to-end-checkout-api.robot' on line 4: Non-existing setting 'Librayr'. Did you mean: Library
